flow.title: Scan. Review. Charge.
flow.description: A visual route that keeps the ticket, register, and next action in the same context.
flow.chargeLocked: Open the cash session to continue

checkout.chargeSummaryDescription: Review VAT-inclusive values before finalizing the receipt.
checkout.shortcutsHint: `Alt+P` search, `Alt+C` quantity, `Alt+D` discount, `Alt+U` unit in dialog
checkout.hubGatedHint: Sale completion is paused until the store hub is reachable again. Verify the hub is on and connected.
checkout.activeSiteHint: The selected site controls sequential numbering and stock validation.
checkout.noSiteWarning: Select an active site before charging so the correct sequential and stock scope are used.
checkout.keyboardHint: Keyboard-first workflow: `F5` catalog, `F1` charge, `Delete` remove current line
checkout.searchHint: Search reuses the existing catalog dialog with unit selection and stock-aware validation.
checkout.adjustHint: Adjust quantities, discounts, and tax-inclusive totals before sending the sale to payment.
checkout.quickSuggestionHelper: Catalog-based suggestions surface here when wired.

cart.empty: Search and add products to start a sale.

serials.title: Serials for {{name}}
serials.siteRequired: Select an active site to load serial numbers.
serials.loadError: Available serial numbers could not be loaded.
serials.noneAvailable: No sellable serial numbers are available at this site.
serials.selectionRequired: Select one exact serial for every base unit before charging.

cashSession.title: Cash session
cashSession.hint: Open a register before charging or refunding sales so the drawer balance stays auditable.
cashSession.assignmentHint: Choose the drawer you will operate before opening the cash session.
cashSession.assignmentUnavailable: No register assignments are available for this site yet.
cashSession.assignmentSelectedHint: The opening dialog will preload the standard denomination template for this register.
cashSession.chargeBlocked: Charging is enabled once the opening cash count is registered.
cashSession.blindCloseHint: Blind close keeps the expected drawer balance hidden until the closing count is submitted.
cashSession.supervisedCloseHint: Supervised close shows the live difference while you balance the drawer.

timeline.title: Movement timeline
timeline.description: Every cash inflow and outflow recorded during the active shift.
timeline.empty: No cash movements have been recorded for this session yet.

report.title: Cash management
report.description: Monitor open registers, recent closures, and discrepancies for the active site.
report.noAlerts: No discrepancy alerts in the latest closed sessions.
report.activeSessionsEmpty: No active sessions are open for this site.
report.recentClosuresEmpty: No recent closed sessions are available yet.

form.title: Open cash session
form.description: Count each denomination and confirm it matches the opening float before starting the shift.
form.mismatch: The opening float must match the denomination count total.
form.denominationsHint: Use whole counts for each bill or coin available in the drawer.

closeForm.title: Close cash session
closeForm.description: Count the full drawer, enter the blind closing total, and submit the denomination breakdown to reconcile the shift.
closeForm.supervisedDescription: Count the drawer by denomination. Live balancing feedback is available because you are supervising this close.
closeForm.blindCloseHint: The expected drawer balance stays hidden until you submit the count.
closeForm.supervisedCloseHint: Live over/short feedback is visible to managers and administrators.
closeForm.mismatch: The blind closing total must match the denomination count total.
closeForm.supervisedMismatch: The closing total must match the denomination count total.
closeForm.denominationsHint: Use whole counts for every bill or coin still in the drawer.
closeForm.byMethodHint: Card · Transfer · Credit · Other surface once sales-by-method roll-up is available.

dayClose.title: Day closed
dayClose.subtitle: {{registerName}} · {{date}}
dayClose.error: We could not load the day summary. Your register was closed correctly.

pulse.title: 📊 Day pulse — {{date}} · {{registerName}}

comparison.up: {{percent}}% more than the same weekday last week ({{amount}}).
comparison.down: {{percent}}% less than the same weekday last week ({{amount}}).
comparison.flat: Sales matched the same weekday last week ({{amount}}).
comparison.unavailable: There is no prior-week sales baseline to compare yet.

pulse.privacy: Includes aggregate metrics only; no customer data is shared.
pulse.imageError: We could not generate the image. You can still share the text via WhatsApp.

movementForm.title: Record cash movement
movementForm.description: Register every manual cash inflow or outflow so the drawer timeline stays auditable during the shift.
movementForm.amountRequired: Cash movement amount must be greater than zero.
movementForm.noteRequired: Enter a short audit note for the movement.
movementForm.noteTooLong: Cash movement note must be 240 characters or fewer.

typeHints.paid_in: Use paid in when extra cash is added to the drawer from outside the session.
typeHints.paid_out: Use paid out when cash leaves the drawer for an expense or external transfer.
typeHints.skim: Use skim when excess cash is removed from the drawer and sent to the safe.
typeHints.replenishment: Use replenishment when change is added to the drawer to keep operating.

toast.openWithAttendanceDescription: {{registerName}} is ready with {{amount}}. Your attendance shift started automatically.
toast.closeAttendanceDescription: {{description}} Your attendance remains open until you clock out from the user menu.

payment.title: Charge Sale
payment.splitHelp: Combine cash, card, transfer, or other settled methods. Amounts must sum to the sale total before you can confirm.
payment.splitMustMatch: Tenders must sum to the sale total before you can confirm.

tip.heading: Tip
tip.helper: Optional. Calculated on the pre-tip total.

history.title: Sales history
history.description: Review recent receipts, payment states, and cashier activity without leaving the POS workspace.

refund.title: Return sale
refund.description: Confirm a reason to register the return for this change.
refund.descriptionWithNumber: Confirm a reason to register the return for ticket {{number}}.
refund.approvalLockBody: The amount exceeds the operational threshold. Request authorization before confirming.
refund.linesHint: Line selection is captured in the reason. The full ticket still refunds for compatibility.

refund.title: Refund Sale
refund.message: Refunding this sale will restore stock for all sale items and exclude it from completed sales revenue while preserving the historical sale record.

void.title: Void Sale
void.message: Voiding this sale will restore stock for all sale items and remove it from completed sales totals. This action cannot be undone.

quickSearch.label: Product / barcode
quickSearch.placeholder: Scan barcode or type SKU / name

park.suspendHint: Set the current cart aside so you can start another one. You can resume it later from the suspended sales panel.
park.emptyState: No suspended sales yet. Press Ctrl+P after adding items to suspend the current cart.
park.panelDescription: Drafts that were set aside so a different customer could be served first.
park.overrideHint: You are resuming a draft suspended by another cashier.
park.closedSessionWarning: You have {{count}} suspended sales. They remain as drafts and will survive the close, but will not produce a receipt until resumed.
park.confirmDiscardMessage: The suspended draft will be cancelled and every item returns to inventory. This cannot be undone.
park.newSaleHint: Start a second cart in parallel without charging the current one.
park.localWorkspacesDescription: Switch between local carts before suspending or charging them.
park.labelPromptDescription: Add an optional label so you can find this draft later (e.g. Mesa 5).
park.resumedBannerHint: To change items, discard this draft and start a new sale.

reprint.title: Reprint receipt
reprint.description: The receipt will be rendered again with the original sale data. Each reprint is recorded in the audit log.
reprint.reasonDetailPlaceholder: Describe the reason for this reprint
reprint.noPermission: Cashiers can only reprint sales from their active cash session.

scanner.lookupFailed: Could not look up the scanned code
scanner.resumedCartLocked: Discard the resumed cart to add new items

printer.escposFailedFallback: ESC/POS print failed; printed via the system printer
printer.autoPrintFailed: Auto-print failed; reprint manually from the sale details
printer.kickDrawerFailed: Could not open the cash drawer
printer.noDrawerRegistered: No cash drawer is registered for this site

card.balanceUnavailable: The balance could not be loaded
card.balanceUnavailableHelp: Without it the cupo cannot be projected, so the sale stays blocked. Retry, or charge by another method.

warning.exceedsLimit: The projected balance exceeds the customer's credit limit. Ask an administrator to authorize an override or split the excess as cash.

override.label: Authorize exceeding the credit limit
override.adminHelp: Adds the sale even though the projected balance exceeds the customer's limit. Use this only with administrator approval.
override.adminOnly: Only an administrator can authorize this
override.approvalRequired: An administrator must approve this override before you can complete the sale.

approval.title: Approval required
approval.help: Approval covers only this exact action and its details.
approval.statusError: Approval status could not be refreshed. Retry before charging.

customer.autoAttachToast: Customer created and attached to the sale.

cash_session_required.message: Your cash session is closed — open it before charging.

credit_sale_customer_required.message: Credit sales need a customer attached.

credit_limit_exceeded.message: Projection {{projection}} exceeds the customer's credit limit of {{limit}}. You can request approval at checkout.

discount_exceeds_total.message: Discount {{discount}} is larger than the cart total {{total}}.

insufficient_stock.message_one: Stock might run short on {{product}} — confirm before charging.
insufficient_stock.message_other: Stock might run short on {{product}} and {{otherCount}} other items — confirm before charging.

fiscal_not_active.message: DIAN is not active — this sale will not issue an electronic invoice.

receipt_hardware_missing.message: No receipt printer is set up — you can reprint from the sale later.

payment_rail_missing.message: Only cash is configured — add a card or transfer rail when you need one.

sync_backlog.message: Sync is behind or has conflicts — selling still works; clear it when convenient.
